arts.ttl: “Inter, be careful of Leipzig”: Benitez warns as Champions League heats up
arts.sum: Former Inter coach Rafa Benitez shared his thoughts on the current state of the Champions League and the challenges facing Italian clubs. As the tournament intensifies, the Spaniard emphasized the critical nature of upcoming matches and the need for teams to avoid mistakes in an interview with La Gazzetta dello Sport. Reflecting on the pressure of the competition, Benitez stated, “There is always a moment of truth that sometimes needs to be pulled out by the hair, even at the cost of hurting yourself. The Champions League is now in full swing, and from now on, mistakes are almost forbidden.” The post “Inter, be careful of Leipzig”: Benitez warns as Champions League heats up appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan eyeing Bijol for defensive reinforcement, Palacios potentially Involved
arts.sum: Inter Milan are considering a January transfer market move to bolster their defence, according to reports from Tuttosport. The Nerazzurri’s interest in strengthening their backline stems from Francesco Acerbi’s recent fitness concerns and the limited involvement of Tomas Palacios in the team’s rotation so far this season. The player identified by Inter’s sporting directors Beppe Marotta and Piero Ausilio is Jaka Bijol, a 24-year-old defender currently playing for Udinese. arts.ttl: Champions League | Inter v RB Leipzig: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Inter Milan head coach Simone Inzaghi is set to make several changes to his lineup as the team prepare to face RB Leipzig in the UEFA Champions League. The Nerazzurri will be without Francesco Acerbi and Davide Frattesi, but welcome back key players Hakan Calhanoglu and Lautaro Martinez. Martinez is expected to partner with Mehdi Taremi in attack, forming a new striking duo for this crucial European fixture. The return of these players provides a significant boost to Inter’s offensive capabilities. Inzaghi is also reintroducing several players who were rested during last Saturday’s Serie A match against Verona. arts.ttl: Champions League | Inter v RB Leipzig: Match Prediction, Preview, Team News and Lineups
arts.sum: In a highly anticipated Champions League encounter, Inter Milan will host RB Leipzig at the iconic San Siro on Tuesday evening. The match presents a stark contrast in fortunes, with Inter enjoying an unbeaten run in the competition while Leipzig struggle to find their footing. Inter Milan have been in impressive form, kicking off their campaign with a resilient 0-0 draw against Manchester City. They’ve since secured victories over Red Star Belgrade, Young Boys, and Arsenal, maintaining a perfect defensive record with no goals conceded.
